'''0-1B''' was a [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] that worked incognito as a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] aboard the barge ''[[Dune Princess]]''. It was assigned by [[Slicer/Legends|slicer]] "[[Never Die]]" to obtain the [[Shard of Alderaan]], a sought-after slicing program, before [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Begas Tok]] auctioned it off thus risking its falling into the wrong hands.<ref name="Live-Action Adventures" />
